mapper.select: select distinct p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, p.created_at from project p where p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) order by p.created_at desc, p.project_name

select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when nvl(user_access.permission_count, 0) > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end as permission_yn from project p left join ( select pm.project_id, count(*) as member_count, max(case when perm.permission_code = #{permissionCode} then 1 else 0 end) as permission_count from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id left join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id left join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId} and tm.user_id = #{userId} group by pm.project_id ) user_access on p.project_id = user_access.project_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or nvl(user_access.member_count, 0) > 0 )

select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when nvl(user_access.issue_create_count, 0) > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end as issue_create_permission_yn, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when nvl(user_access.milestone_create_count, 0) > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end as milestone_create_permission_yn from project p left join ( select pm.project_id, count(*) as member_count, max(case when perm.permission_code = #{issueCreatePermissionCode} then 1 else 0 end) as issue_create_count, max(case when perm.permission_code = #{milestoneCreatePermissionCode} then 1 else 0 end) as milestone_create_count from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id left join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id left join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId} and tm.user_id = #{userId} group by pm.project_id ) user_access on p.project_id = user_access.project_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or nvl(user_access.member_count, 0) > 0 )
select project_id from project where project_id = #{projectId} for update
select nvl(max(issue_no), 0) + 1 from issue where project_id = #{projectId}
select ( select nvl(max(i.issue_no), 0) + 1 from issue i where i.project_id = p.project_id ) as issue_no from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} for update

select ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn from issue_status ist join project p on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} order by ist.issue_status_id asc

select i.issue_id, i.issue_no, '#' || lpad(to_char(i.issue_no), 4, '0') as display_issue_no, i.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, i.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, i.version_id, v.version_name, v.status_code as version_status_code, i.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, i.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn, i.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, i.assignee_id, assignee.user_name as assignee_name, i.author_id, author.user_name as author_name, i.title, i.description, i.start_date, i.due_date, i.estimated_hours, i.progress_rate, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.parent_issue_id, parent_issue.title as parent_issue_title, ( select count(distinct nvl(h.history_group_id, h.history_id)) from issue_history h where h.issue_id = i.issue_id ) as total_count, ( select count(*) from time_log tl where tl.issue_id = i.issue_id ) as time_log_total_count, ( select nvl(sum(tl.hours), 0) from time_log tl where tl.issue_id = i.issue_id ) as time_log_total_hours, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{updatePermissionCode} ) then 'Y' when i.assignee_id = #{userId} and exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{updateOwnPermissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as issue_update_permission_yn, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{deletePermissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as issue_delete_permission_yn from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id left join issue_type it on i.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id left join issue_status ist on i.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id left join setting_code sc on i.setting_code_id = sc.setting_code_id left join users assignee on i.assignee_id = assignee.user_id left join users author on i.author_id = author.user_id left join project_version v on i.version_id = v.version_id and i.project_id = v.project_id left join milestone m on i.milestone_id = m.milestone_id and i.project_id = m.project_id left join issue parent_issue on i.parent_issue_id = parent_issue.issue_id and i.project_id = parent_issue.project_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select count(*) from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select * from ( select 'FIELD_SETTING' as option_group, current_issue.issue_type_id, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over ( order by case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end ) as row_sort from issue current_issue join issue_type_field_setting fs on current_issue.issue_type_id = fs.issue_type_id where current_issue.project_id = #{projectId} and current_issue.issue_id = #{issueId}
union all
select 'AVAILABLE_STATUS' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by ist.issue_status_id asc) as row_sort from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id join issue_status ist on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( ist.issue_status_id = i.issue_status_id or p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from workflow_transition wt join project_member pm on wt.role_id = pm.role_id join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = i.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and wt.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and wt.from_status_id = i.issue_status_id and wt.to_status_id = ist.issue_status_id and ( wt.apply_target_code = 'j001' or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j002' and i.author_id = #{userId}) or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j003' and i.assignee_id = #{userId}) ) ) )
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc) as row_sort from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002'
union all
select 'ASSIGNEE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, x.assignee_id, x.assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 4 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by x.assignee_name, x.assignee_id) as row_sort from ( select u.user_id as assignee_id, u.user_name as assignee_name from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join users u on tm.user_id = u.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId}
union
select owner_user.user_id as assignee_id, owner_user.user_name as assignee_name from project p join users owner_user on p.owner_id = owner_user.user_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} ) x
union all
select 'MILESTONE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, m.version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 5 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by m.start_date asc nulls last, m.milestone_id asc) as row_sort from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id left join issue current_issue on current_issue.issue_id = #{issueId} and current_issue.project_id = m.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.version_id = current_issue.version_id and ( v.status_code != 'k003' or current_issue.milestone_id = m.milestone_id )
union all
select 'PARENT_ISSUE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, parent.issue_id as parent_issue_id, parent.title as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 6 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by parent.issue_no desc) as row_sort from issue parent where parent.project_id = #{projectId} and parent.issue_id != #{issueId} and nvl(parent.progress_rate, 0) < 100 ) order by option_sort, row_sort

select child.issue_id, child.issue_no, '#' || lpad(to_char(child.issue_no), 4, '0') as display_issue_no, child.title, child.progress_rate, child.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn from issue child left join issue_status ist on child.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where child.project_id = #{projectId} and child.parent_issue_id = #{issueId} order by child.issue_no asc

select h.history_id, h.history_group_id, h.issue_id, h.changed_by, u.user_name as changed_by_name, h.change_type_code, h.field_code, h.field_name, h.reason, h.before_value, h.after_value, h.changed_at from issue_history h left join users u on h.changed_by = u.user_id where h.issue_id = #{issueId} order by max(h.changed_at) over (partition by h.history_group_id) desc, h.history_group_id desc, h.changed_at asc, h.history_id asc

with accessible_issue as ( select i.issue_id from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) ) ), group_page as ( select history_group_id, group_row from ( select group_base.*, row_number() over (order by group_base.group_changed_at desc, group_base.history_group_id desc) as group_row from ( select nvl(h.history_group_id, h.history_id) as history_group_id, max(h.changed_at) as group_changed_at from issue_history h join accessible_issue ai on h.issue_id = ai.issue_id group by nvl(h.history_group_id, h.history_id) ) group_base ) where group_row between #{startGroupRow} and #{endGroupRow} ) select h.history_id, nvl(h.history_group_id, h.history_id) as history_group_id, h.issue_id, h.changed_by, u.user_name as changed_by_name, h.change_type_code, h.field_code, h.field_name, h.reason, h.before_value, h.after_value, h.changed_at from group_page gp join issue_history h on h.issue_id = #{issueId} and nvl(h.history_group_id, h.history_id) = gp.history_group_id left join users u on h.changed_by = u.user_id order by gp.group_row asc, h.changed_at asc, h.history_id asc

select distinct ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id join issue_status ist on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( ist.issue_status_id = i.issue_status_id or p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from workflow_transition wt join project_member pm on wt.role_id = pm.role_id join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = i.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and wt.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and wt.from_status_id = i.issue_status_id and wt.to_status_id = ist.issue_status_id and ( wt.apply_target_code = 'j001' or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j002' and i.author_id = #{userId}) or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j003' and i.assignee_id = #{userId}) ) ) ) order by ist.issue_status_id asc

select it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId} order by it.created_at asc, it.issue_type_id asc

select it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId} and it.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId}

select itp.issue_type_id, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn from issue_type_project itp join issue_type_field_setting fs on itp.issue_type_id = fs.issue_type_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId} order by itp.issue_type_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end

select fs.issue_type_id, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} order by case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end

select version_id, version_name, status_code as version_status_code, default_yn from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} and status_code != 'k003' order by default_yn desc, created_at desc, version_id asc

select m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, m.version_id from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and v.status_code != 'k003' order by m.start_date asc, m.milestone_id asc

select sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, sc.default_yn from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc
select issue_id as parent_issue_id, title as parent_issue_title from issue where project_id = #{projectId} and nvl(progress_rate, 0) < 100 order by issue_no desc

select * from ( select 'ISSUE_TYPE' as option_group, it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by it.created_at asc, it.issue_type_id asc) as row_sort from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'ISSUE_STATUS' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by ist.issue_status_id asc) as row_sort from issue_status ist join project p on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'VERSION' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, version_id, version_name, status_code as version_status_code, default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by default_yn desc, created_at desc, version_id asc) as row_sort from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} and status_code != 'k003'
union all
select 'MILESTONE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, '__NONE__' as milestone_id, '미지정' as milestone_title, 4 as option_sort, 0 as row_sort from dual where exists ( select 1 from issue i where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.milestone_id is null )
union all
select 'MILESTONE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, 4 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by m.start_date asc nulls last, m.milestone_id asc) as row_sort from milestone m where m.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, sc.default_yn, sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, 5 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc) as row_sort from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002'
union all
select 'ASSIGNEE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, x.assignee_id, x.assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, 6 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by x.assignee_name, x.assignee_id) as row_sort from ( select u.user_id as assignee_id, u.user_name as assignee_name from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join users u on tm.user_id = u.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId}
union
select owner_user.user_id as assignee_id, owner_user.user_name as assignee_name from project p join users owner_user on p.owner_id = owner_user.user_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} ) x ) order by option_sort, row_sort

with issue_source as ( select i.issue_type_id, i.version_id, i.setting_code_id, i.assignee_id, i.milestone_id, i.issue_status_id from issue i where i.project_id = #{projectId} ) select 'REPORT_SOURCE' as option_group, i.issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, i.version_id, null as version_name, i.setting_code_id, null as setting_name, nvl(i.assignee_id, '__NONE__') as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, nvl(i.milestone_id, '__NONE__') as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, i.issue_status_id, null as closed_yn from issue_source i
union all
select 'ISSUE_STATUS' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, ist.issue_status_id, nvl(ist.closed_yn, 'N') as closed_yn from issue_status ist where exists ( select 1 from issue_source i where i.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id )
union all
select 'ISSUE_TYPE' as option_group, it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as issue_status_id, null as closed_yn from issue_type it where exists ( select 1 from issue_source i where i.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id )
union all
select 'VERSION' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, v.version_id, v.version_name, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as issue_status_id, null as closed_yn from project_version v where v.project_id = #{projectId} and exists ( select 1 from issue_source i where i.version_id = v.version_id )
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as version_id, null as version_name, sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as issue_status_id, null as closed_yn from setting_code sc where exists ( select 1 from issue_source i where i.setting_code_id = sc.setting_code_id )
union all
select 'ASSIGNEE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, u.user_id as assignee_id, u.user_name as assignee_name, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as issue_status_id, null as closed_yn from users u where exists ( select 1 from issue_source i where i.assignee_id = u.user_id )
union all
select 'MILESTONE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, null as issue_status_id, null as closed_yn from milestone m where m.project_id = #{projectId} and exists ( select 1 from issue_source i where i.milestone_id = m.milestone_id )

select * from ( select 'ISSUE_TYPE' as option_group, it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by it.created_at asc, it.issue_type_id asc) as row_sort from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'FIELD_SETTING' as option_group, itp.issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over ( order by itp.issue_type_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end ) as row_sort from issue_type_project itp join issue_type_field_setting fs on itp.issue_type_id = fs.issue_type_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'VERSION' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, version_id, version_name, status_code as version_status_code, default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by default_yn desc, created_at desc, version_id asc) as row_sort from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} and status_code != 'k003'
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, sc.default_yn, sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, 4 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc) as row_sort from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' ) order by option_sort, row_sort

select * from ( select 'MILESTONE' as option_group, m.version_id, m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by m.start_date asc nulls last, m.milestone_id asc) as row_sort from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and v.status_code != 'k003'
union all
select 'ASSIGNEE' as option_group, null as version_id, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, x.assignee_id, x.assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by x.assignee_name, x.assignee_id) as row_sort from ( select u.user_id as assignee_id, u.user_name as assignee_name from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join users u on tm.user_id = u.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId}
union
select owner_user.user_id as assignee_id, owner_user.user_name as assignee_name from project p join users owner_user on p.owner_id = owner_user.user_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} ) x
union all
select 'PARENT_ISSUE' as option_group, null as version_id, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, issue_id as parent_issue_id, title as parent_issue_title, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by issue_no desc) as row_sort from issue where project_id = #{projectId} and nvl(progress_rate, 0) < 100 ) order by option_sort, row_sort

select it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, case when itp.issue_type_project_id is null then 'N' else 'Y' end as project_applied_yn, nvl(issue_usage.used_count, 0) as used_count from project p join issue_type it on it.user_id = p.owner_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id left join issue_type_project itp on itp.project_id = p.project_id and itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id left join ( select issue_type_id, count(*) as used_count from issue where project_id = #{projectId} group by issue_type_id ) issue_usage on issue_usage.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and p.owner_id = #{userId} order by it.created_at asc, it.issue_type_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert all
into issue_type_project ( issue_type_project_id, issue_type_id, project_id, created_at ) values ( 'ISSUE_TYPE_PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad(base_no + #{index} + 1, 4, '0'), #{issueTypeId}, #{projectId}, sysdate )
select nvl(max(to_number(substr(issue_type_project_id, -4))), 0) as base_no from issue_type_project where substr(issue_type_project_id, 1, 24) = 'ISSUE_TYPE_PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
mapper.select: select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, ( select nvl(max(i.issue_no), 0) + 1 from issue i where i.project_id = p.project_id ) as issue_no, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{permissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as permission_yn, ( select max(it.initial_status_id) from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id where itp.project_id = p.project_id and it.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} ) as initial_status_id, ( select count(*) from project_version pv where pv.project_id = p.project_id and pv.version_id = #{issue.versionId} and pv.status_code != 'k003' ) as version_count, ( select count(*) from setting_code sc where sc.user_id = p.owner_id and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' and sc.setting_code_id = #{issue.settingCodeId} ) as priority_count, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i001', 'ASSIGNEE') ), 'N') as assignee_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i001', 'ASSIGNEE') ), 'N') as assignee_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i002', 'MILESTONE') ), 'N') as milestone_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i002', 'MILESTONE') ), 'N') as milestone_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i003', 'PARENT_ISSUE') ), 'N') as parent_issue_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i003', 'PARENT_ISSUE') ), 'N') as parent_issue_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i004', 'START_DATE') ), 'N') as start_date_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i004', 'START_DATE') ), 'N') as start_date_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i005', 'DUE_DATE') ), 'N') as due_date_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i005', 'DUE_DATE') ), 'N') as due_date_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i006', 'ESTIMATED_HOURS') ), 'N') as estimated_hours_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i006', 'ESTIMATED_HOURS') ), 'N') as estimated_hours_required_yn, ( select count(*) from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{issue.assigneeId} ) + case when p.owner_id = #{issue.assigneeId} then 1 else 0 end as assignee_count, ( select count(*) from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id where m.project_id = p.project_id and m.version_id = #{issue.versionId} and m.milestone_id = #{issue.milestoneId} and v.status_code != 'k003' ) as milestone_count, ( select count(*) from issue parent_issue where parent_issue.project_id = p.project_id and parent_issue.issue_id = #{issue.parentIssueId} and nvl(parent_issue.progress_rate, 0) < 100 ) as parent_issue_count from project p where p.project_id = #{issue.projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) ) for update

select ( select count(*) from setting_code sc where sc.user_id = p.owner_id and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' and sc.setting_code_id = #{issue.settingCodeId} ) as priority_count, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i001', 'ASSIGNEE') ), 'N') as assignee_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i001', 'ASSIGNEE') ), 'N') as assignee_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i002', 'MILESTONE') ), 'N') as milestone_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i002', 'MILESTONE') ), 'N') as milestone_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i003', 'PARENT_ISSUE') ), 'N') as parent_issue_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i003', 'PARENT_ISSUE') ), 'N') as parent_issue_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i004', 'START_DATE') ), 'N') as start_date_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i004', 'START_DATE') ), 'N') as start_date_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i005', 'DUE_DATE') ), 'N') as due_date_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i005', 'DUE_DATE') ), 'N') as due_date_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i006', 'ESTIMATED_HOURS') ), 'N') as estimated_hours_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and fs.field_code in ('i006', 'ESTIMATED_HOURS') ), 'N') as estimated_hours_required_yn, ( select count(*) from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{issue.assigneeId} ) + case when p.owner_id = #{issue.assigneeId} then 1 else 0 end as assignee_count, ( select count(*) from milestone m where m.project_id = p.project_id and m.version_id = i.version_id and m.milestone_id = #{issue.milestoneId} ) as milestone_count, ( select count(*) from issue parent_issue where parent_issue.project_id = p.project_id and parent_issue.issue_id = #{issue.parentIssueId} and nvl(parent_issue.progress_rate, 0) < 100 ) as parent_issue_count, ( select count(*) from issue child_issue where child_issue.project_id = p.project_id and child_issue.parent_issue_id = i.issue_id and nvl(child_issue.progress_rate, 0) < 100 ) as child_incomplete_count, case when i.issue_status_id = #{issue.issueStatusId} then 'Y' when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from workflow_transition wt join project_member pm on wt.role_id = pm.role_id join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = i.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and wt.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and wt.from_status_id = i.issue_status_id and wt.to_status_id = #{issue.issueStatusId} and ( wt.apply_target_code = 'j001' or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j002' and i.author_id = #{userId}) or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j003' and i.assignee_id = #{userId}) ) ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as transition_allowed_yn from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id where i.project_id = #{issue.projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issue.issueId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ISSUE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD(NVL(MAX(issue_seq), 0) + 1, 4, '0') FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(issue_id, -4)) AS issue_seq FROM issue WHERE SUBSTR(issue_id, 1, 11) = 'ISSUE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(issue_id, -4)) AS issue_seq FROM issue_history WHERE SUBSTR(issue_id, 1, 11) = 'ISSUE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' )
insert into issue ( issue_id, issue_no, project_id, milestone_id, version_id, issue_type_id, issue_status_id, setting_code_id, assignee_id, author_id, title, description, start_date, due_date, estimated_hours, progress_rate, created_at, updated_at, parent_issue_id ) values ( #{issueId}, #{issueNo}, #{projectId}, #{milestoneId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionId}, #{issueTypeId}, #{issueStatusId}, #{settingCodeId}, #{assigneeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nvl(#{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, sysdate), #{dueDate, jdbcType=DATE}, nvl(#{estimatedHours, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), nvl(#{progressRate, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), sysdate, null, #{parentIssueId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select i.issue_id, i.issue_no, '#' || lpad(to_char(i.issue_no), 4, '0') as display_issue_no, i.project_id, i.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, i.version_id, v.version_name, i.issue_type_id, i.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, i.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, i.assignee_id, assignee.user_name as assignee_name, i.author_id, i.title, i.description, i.start_date, i.due_date, i.estimated_hours, i.progress_rate, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.parent_issue_id, case when parent_issue.issue_id is null then null else '#' || lpad(to_char(parent_issue.issue_no), 4, '0') || ' ' || parent_issue.title end as parent_issue_title from issue i left join issue_status ist on i.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id left join setting_code sc on i.setting_code_id = sc.setting_code_id left join users assignee on i.assignee_id = assignee.user_id left join project_version v on i.version_id = v.version_id and i.project_id = v.project_id left join milestone m on i.milestone_id = m.milestone_id and i.project_id = m.project_id left join issue parent_issue on i.parent_issue_id = parent_issue.issue_id and i.project_id = parent_issue.project_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} for update of i.issue_id
mapper.update: update issue set issue_status_id = #{issueStatusId}, setting_code_id = #{settingCodeId}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title}, description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_date = #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, due_date = #{dueDate, jdbcType=DATE}, estimated_hours = nvl(#{estimatedHours, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), progress_rate = nvl(#{progressRate, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), updated_at = sysdate, milestone_id = #{milestoneId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_issue_id = #{parentIssueId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where project_id = #{projectId} and issue_id = #{issueId}
mapper.insert: { call PROC_INSERT_ISSUE_HISTORY( #{issueId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changedBy, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changeTypeCode, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULL, #{reason, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beforeValue, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterValue, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldCode, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldName, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{historyGroupId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
mapper.select: select file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, file_version, connect_address from attach_file where connect_address = #{issueId} and file_id = #{fileId} and file_code = 'f008'

select file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, file_version, connect_address from attach_file where connect_address = #{issueId} and file_code = 'f008'
